titleStmt.title: SII 38.441: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 441. (A.R. No. 441 of 1912.) TIRUPPĀLATTUṞAI, PAPANASAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the north wall, first prākāra, Kshīravanēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Kulōttuṅga (III) who was pleased to take Madurai and the crowned head of Pāṇḍya. Year 12: 1190 A.D.

summary.p: Incomplete as the last line is damaged. Records the apportionment and distribution of hamlets, house sites and wet lands in Puramiraṅgukuladīpanāyaka-puram in Nallūr-nāḍu in Nittavinōda-vaḷanāḍu with the common consent of the sāliyanagarattār (weaver merchants), as was done during previous years.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅkoṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīkulottuṅka coḻatevarkku
yāṇṭu 10 2vatu nittaviṉotavaḷaṉāṭṭu nallūrṉāṭṭu vūr puramiraṅkulatipaṉāyakapurattu cāliyanakarattom Uḷ
ḷur nilamum Ivaru Ivūr piṭākaikaḷum nattaṅkaḷum puñceykaḷum munpilāṇṭukaḷ Āṇṭutoṟum karaikkūṟu Iṭ
ivaru kaiyāle pavuciyam paṉṉaRead paṇṇapeṟalaām taṭṭuppaṭṭu Ivaru kaiyil panṉiraṇṭāvatu nāḷ toṇṇūṟṟu muṉṟiṉāl
kūṟiṭṭu karaiyolai Eṭuttapaṭiye cantirātittavaṟ kūṟāvatāka Uṭaiyār tiruppālaittuṟaiuṭaiyār koyil tiru
Emmil kalveṭṭinom
Digital edition of SII 38.441 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
